summary: Patched manual-outreach delivery target detection so shared manual review assets stay suppressed for every covered target during the active review window, then refreshed the execution board.

why_this_action.summary: The marketing loop kept regenerating a Codeberg-first manual publisher review asset because the delivery log only named TLDL, leaving ComputingForGeeks falsely actionable even though the same shared asset had already been delivered in the current review window.
shared_findings_used: drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet should exist in the current review window
agents/marketing/logs/marketing_2026-05-27_033930_publisher_manual_review_channel_ready_outreach_asset.json: prepared asset still covered TLDL and ComputingForGeeks
agents/marketing/logs/marketing_2026-05-27_052018_reddit_blocked_manual_asset_guard_repair.json: latest truthful non-Reddit lane was the same shared manual review asset

behavior: Manual delivery target detection now backfills covered targets from matching prepared-asset logs when a delivery log only names one target.
Artifact-path matching now checks all known packet/draft/result path fields consistently in selector and executor.
Shared manual review assets now keep every covered target inside the active review window instead of resurfacing the leftover target as fake progress.

result.execution_board_summary: No do-now handoff packet is currently truthful in this review window.

expected_outcome: The loop stops resurfacing leftover targets from already-delivered shared manual review assets and leaves the board truthfully empty until a genuinely new lane appears.

measurement_window.success_metric: marketing_execution_board_latest.md stays empty of primary-repo-flat manual review resurfacing while the current review window remains active.
